examples: My Lang Qing watch just exchange 15 kilogram of carrots and a bowl of funked durra flour.
We only had one or two white (refers to flour) in a year. What we had most was durra cake. Maize corn noodle was also titbit.
People in Durra(ph) on the south side of Baghdad, which is where we were earlier this week, are desperate for some kind of security.
